technical_data.title: Technical Data
text: Primary propulsion: Nakamura-Weiss NW-7 fusion torch.
Rated output: 2.4 gigawatts continuous, 3.1 GW peak burst.
The NW-7 has been in continuous service since 2251. Nakamura-Weiss
ceased manufacture of this model in 2268. Replacement parts are
sourced from the secondary market and are increasingly difficult
to obtain. Field repairs are documented in the engineering log.
Reactor core temperature nominal. Coolant pressure nominal.

circuit_diagram.title: Circuit Diagram
text: Install diagnostic software package to enable.
